\tzpentry{ID11398}{Portal Force-Balance Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The portal-equilibrium condition is represented as net zero directional force across gravitational, inertial, surface, electromagnetic, and zero-point contributions.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\sum_i F_i=F_g+F_{\mathrm{inertial}}+F_{\sigma}+F_{\mathrm{EM}}+F_{\mathrm{ZPF}}=0
